featureDetection.rationale: Leverages the browser's live outerHTML serialization behavior to check for Chrome 138+ escaping support and compares it with simulated pre-138 output.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Provides simulated pre-138 and post-138 comparisons that work reliably and instructively on any browser.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Highly interactive tool allowing live customization of tag name, attribute name, and attribute value with character-by-character difference highlighting.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Excellent side-by-side comparison and explanation of the security impact of escaping rules.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows the design system variables cleanly with appropriate high-contrast color markers.

references.rationale: The page does not contain any reference link to chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: The concept page is missing the required chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144 reference link.
